evidence.scientific_clarity: All 4 panels match the brief exactly (method diagram, ablation bars, training curves, 5x5 heatmap); layout follows gridspec(2,3,width_ratios=[2,1,1]) with Panel D spanning full bottom row.
evidence.typography: Script explicitly sets font.family='DejaVu Sans' (the default matplotlib font); no pdf.fonttype=42 or svg.fonttype=0 is set anywhere in gen_figure.py.
evidence.palette: Seaborn-inspired palette is mostly reasonable, but Panel A places GREEN (Stage 2) and RED (Stage 3) as adjacent categorical colors — a red-green combination that fails deuteranopia/protanopia colorblind safety.
evidence.layout_density: hspace=0.50/wspace=0.38 with tight margins; ablation x-range clipped to [50,68]; all panels fill their allocated space; no overlapping labels visible in code.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption matches all four panels A–D; includes specific numerical claims (64.7% full-model accuracy, 0.04–0.99 score range, S4 column finding); legend placed upper-right with frameon=False.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF strings confirm '/Subtype /Type3' for all three font variants (DejaVuSans, DejaVuSans-Bold, DejaVuSans-Oblique) — Type3 fonts are bitmapped glyphs, not selectable/editable text; fonttype=42 was never set.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf (44 KB), figure.png (115 KB), figure.svg (107 KB), caption.tex (819 B), gen_figure.py (6.2 KB) all present and non-trivial; SVG is a bonus output.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption names each panel, explains the pipeline stages, cites 64.7% full-model accuracy for ablation, gives 0.04–0.99 score range for heatmap, and identifies the S4 column as the high-sensitivity region.

overall_strengths: Layout faithfully implements the brief's gridspec spec with a dominant Panel A, compact B/C, and full-width D; panel labels are bold sans-serif upper-left as required.
Caption is publication-quality: every panel is described with a specific numerical finding, matching the figure content precisely.
overall_weaknesses: No pdf.fonttype=42 (or svg.fonttype=0) set — PDF embeds Type3 (bitmapped) fonts, making text non-selectable and failing the vector-fidelity requirement for journal submission.
DejaVu Sans is used as the explicit font family (the matplotlib default), and the red-green color pairing in Panel A is not colorblind-safe for deuteranopes/protanopes.
